source_jobs.title: (Senior) Controller
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE

We’re looking for a Senior Controller to join Yazio and take full ownership of our controlling function as we continue to scale. You will bring structure, rigour and depth to our monthly close, accounting operations and internal controls, setting the standard for how controlling operates at Yazio. At our current stage, with around 150 employees, the decisions you make around close architecture and accounting design will have a long-lasting impact and will shape how Finance operates for years to come.

You will own and continuously improve our core accounting and controlling processes, ensuring accurate and timely financial reporting and act as the in-house authority on technical accounting topics. Working closely with FP&A, Legal, Operations and external partners, you will support both day-to-day execution and complex accounting questions around new products and transactions.

Let's shape the future of nutrition together and make Yazio the most successful nutrition app worldwide!

This role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal, or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

 - Build, own and drive the monthly close end-to-end, ensuring fast, accurate and well-coordinated financial reporting with Accounting and key stakeholders

 - Review and sign off on accruals, cut-off entries, reconciliations and reporting packages for Management and FP&A

 - Act as the primary go-to for technical accounting questions, supporting new business models, contracts and complex accounting treatments

 - Develop and maintain technical accounting documentation and position papers (for example, revenue recognition, capitalization, leases and other complex topics)

 - Manage and coordinate external partners including accountants, tax advisors and auditors, ensuring strong documentation quality and smooth collaboration

 - Continuously strengthen internal controls by spotting anomalies, following up on open items and improving control effectiveness over time

 - Drive process and system improvements to reduce manual effort, increase close efficiency and build scalable, well-documented workflows

 - Use AI tools to support analysis, variance explanations, audit preparation and accounting research—while ensuring full critical review and accountability for outputs

 - Build a modern, scalable finance function through automation, standardization and continuous improvement



YOUR PROFILE

 - Several years of hands-on experience in Accounting, Controlling or Financial Reporting, ideally in fast-scaling environments with increasing complexity

 - Prior experience leading or coordinating a small accounting team is a plus

 - In-depth knowledge of German HGB; IFRS exposure is a plus

 - Proven ownership of the full monthly close cycle, ensuring accuracy, completeness and high-quality reporting end-to-end

 - Strong internal controls mindset with the ability to proactively identify risks, design controls and continuously improve processes

 - Advanced DATEV skills and confidence working with accounting systems and financial data

 - Comfortable using AI tools to enhance productivity (for example, research, documentation, anomaly detection, reporting support) while applying strong critical judgment on outputs

 - Structured, documentation-first working style with a strong focus on audit readiness and transparency

 - Strong drive for process improvement with a sharp eye for inefficiencies and scalable solutions

 - Proven stakeholder management skills, with experience collaborating with external accountants, tax advisors and auditors

 - Growth mindset and a proactive approach to staying up to date with changes in accounting and tax regulation (e.g., HGB, VAT and IFRS)



WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30

source_jobs.title: Partnerships & Influencer Manager
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE

Ready to shape the future of partnerships in the DACH market and beyond? We're looking for an energetic, commercially minded partnerships manager with a strong network and deep knowledge of the German-speaking market who can identify the right partners, negotiate win-win deals and launch campaigns that drive real impact. You'll own the full partnership lifecycle—from first outreach to long-term relationship management—while constantly innovating and scaling what works. If you love connecting with people, spotting opportunities before others do and turning ideas into measurable results, this role is for you.

At YAZIO, we're on a mission to help millions of people worldwide live healthier lives through better nutrition—and we know partnerships are key to scaling our impact. As our new Partnerships Manager, you'll build and grow strategic B2B and influencer partnerships across DACH and international markets, contributing directly to one of the company's most important growth levers.

This role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal, or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

 - Build, manage and scale strategic B2B partnerships across the DACH region and international markets

 - Identify, approach and onboard new partners—from initial outreach to signed agreements and long-term collaboration

 - Own the entire partnership lifecycle, including negotiations, onboarding, briefing creation, approval processes and ongoing relationship management

 - Evaluate potential partners based on brand fit, audience alignment, content quality and key performance metrics

 - Develop and execute innovative partnership concepts and campaigns, with a strong focus on B2B partnerships next to revenue share partnerships with influencers

 - Analyze partnership and campaign performance, derive actionable insights and continuously optimize existing and future initiatives

 - Drive the development of scalable processes within the partnerships team, leveraging automation and workflow optimization

 - Manage all operational aspects of partnerships, including invoicing, documentation and contract management

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with internal stakeholders and external partners to ensure seamless execution of campaigns and projects

 - Represent the company and network at industry events, conferences and networking opportunities

 - Occasionally support influencer events and creator activations, depending on team needs and priorities



YOUR PROFILE

 - 2+ years of experience in B2B partnership management, with a strong understanding of the DACH market

 - Skilled communicator with the ability to build authentic relationships and foster trust

 - Growth mindset: curious, ambitious and constantly looking to improve

 - Entrepreneurial, hands-on and impact-driven with a strong sense of ownership

 - Team player who thrives in fast-paced, dynamic environments

 - Excellent networking skills and a natural talent for connecting with new people

 - Outgoing, proactive and confident in approaching others across channels (events, calls, email)

 - Proven negotiation skills with a focus on creating win-win partnerships

 - High-energy, driven and passionate about the influencer marketing space

 - Keen interest in nutrition, fitness and health

 - Fluent in German and English with strong written and verbal communication skills; additional languages are a plus



WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30 vacation days to relax and recharge, plus 5 child sick days if your little one needs you

 - A focus-driven culture that values efficiency over long hours - no overtime expectations, and if it happens, you get that time back!

 - A high-impact environment where your work drives real change - short decisi

source_jobs.title: (Senior) FP&A Manager
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE

We’re looking for a FP&A Manager to take full ownership of budgeting, forecasting and financial planning as we continue to scale. In a fast-moving environment, your work will directly influence decision-making and have a high-impact effect across the business.

You will drive accurate, forward-looking financial insights, own cross-functional planning cycles end-to-end and turn complex business questions into clear, actionable models and recommendations. Working closely with Finance, Product, Operations and senior leadership, you’ll support both day-to-day decision-making and strategic topics such as growth initiatives, pricing and headcount planning.

Let's shape the future of nutrition together and make Yazio the most successful nutrition app worldwide!

This role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal, or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

 - Act as a strategic finance partner to business leads, translating complex financial questions into clear insights, decision-ready models and actionable recommendations

 - Lead the annual budget cycle, driving the end-to-end planning, alignment and consolidation of financial budgets across the organization

 - Build and own ad hoc financial models to support key business decisions such as headcount planning, business cases, pricing and cost optimisation

 - Own and continuously maintain rolling forecasts, incorporating actuals and evolving assumptions to ensure a reliable, forward-looking financial view

 - Prepare monthly management reporting, including variance analysis and leadership commentary, leveraging AI tools to accelerate first drafts while ensuring high accuracy and quality

 - Drive the continuous evolution of FP&A processes, dashboards and tooling with a strong focus on automation and reducing manual spreadsheet work

 - Shape and scale a modern, high-impact FP&A function in close alignment with financial stakeholders



YOUR PROFILE

 - Advanced financial modelling expertise, with Excel as a core skill; experience with FP&A tools such as Abacum (or similar) is a strong plus

 - Proven ownership of end-to-end budgeting and forecasting cycles across functions, with full accountability for outcomes

 - Clear communicator with the ability to translate financial complexity into structured insights for non-finance stakeholders, including senior leadership; comfortable in async, remote-first environments

 - Strong business acumen with genuine curiosity for product, users and unit economics—able to go beyond reporting to challenge assumptions and influence decisions

 - Highly proficient and critical AI user, actively integrating AI into daily workflows (modelling, analysis, communication), while understanding its limitations and rigorously validating outputs

 - Comfortable operating in ambiguity, making clear decisions with imperfect data and transparently communicating assumptions and uncertainty

 - Hands-on, high-ownership mindset with experience in fast-scaling environments

 - Experience with SQL or basic data querying is a strong plus



WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30 vacation days to relax and recharge, plus 5 child sick days if your little one needs you

 - A focus-driven culture that values efficiency over long hours - no overtime expectations, and if it happens, you get that time back!

 - A high-impact environment where your work drives real change - short decision-making processes and no micromanagement

 - A team culture where ambition and balance go hand in hand, supported by strong connections - from our fully covered company retreat to team meetups and virtual coffee breaks

 - Tools and support to do your best work: MacBook, monitor, and €1,000 annual learning budget, plus regular feedback and c

source_jobs.title: Senior Internal Tooling Engineer
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE

What if the tools you build didn't just help one team, but unlocked the potential of an entire company?

At Yazio, we're looking for a Senior Internal Tooling Engineer to turn repetitive work into intelligent systems. You'll help shape how AI is used across the business, building production-ready tools that empower teams to move faster, eliminate manual work and focus on what matters most.

If you're excited by solving real problems, shipping AI-powered software/features that create measurable impact and owning your work from idea to production, this is where your expertise will have its greatest impact.

This role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

 - Design and ship the internal tools, automations and platforms that remove bottlenecks across Yazio, owning the full stack from web apps to distributed, async job processing systems

 - Drive discovery with internal stakeholders, marketing, localization, user success and others, to uncover their biggest bottlenecks and ship tailored solutions that eliminate manual work

 - Build and scale our AI driven systems, such as our Creative Automation System (automated creative uploads and ad creation) and Content Generation System (production grade AI translations), bringing the latest AI capabilities, LLMs, RAG and agents, into production

 - Apply cutting edge AI to how you work, using agentic coding and AI assistants to build and ship fast while maintaining a high bar for quality and safety

 - Make key technical decisions and design robust, distributed and maintainable architectures, including queuing, asynchronous processing and the reliability our automations depend on

 - Own your work end to end, from scoping and stakeholder alignment through delivery, measurement and iteration, anticipating downstream effects and removing roadblocks proactively

 - Raise the bar for the team, mentor others in software design and process automation, document clearly and help shape how Yazio adopts new AI technology

YOUR PROFILE

 - 5+ years building modern web applications end to end, ideally with Go and HTMX (plus Python), and comfortable owning distributed, asynchronous systems (queuing, background processing)

 - High level of hands-on AI knowledge—LLMs, RAG (such as pgvector), prompt engineering, model routing (such as OpenRouter) and frameworks like LangChain—with experience shipping AI-driven features in production

 - Transformative mindset toward AI-based workflows, with a focus on agentic coding: you use AI to boost your productivity while maintaining high software standards

 - Strong track record of end-to-end ownership: you organize delivery from scoping to launch, anticipate downstream effects and act proactively without waiting for permission

 - Pragmatic: you build the smallest valuable piece first, prioritize ruthlessly and leave the code better than you found it even while moving fast

 - True product-engineer mindset: obsessed with the user experience and the "why" behind what you build, comfortable with product metrics and driven to make a measurable impact

 - Excellent communicator who explains complex technical topics clearly to technical and non-technical partners and documents effectively in writing

WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30 vacation days to relax and recharge, plus 5 child sick days if your little one needs you

 - A focus-driven culture that values efficiency over long hours - no overtime expectations, and if it happens, you get that time back!

 - A high-impact environment where your work drives real change - short decision-making processes and no micromanagement

 - A team culture where ambition and balance go hand in hand, supported by strong connection

source_jobs.title: Marketing Operations & Automation Manager
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE!

Marketing is evolving fast. Tools are multiplying. AI is reshaping workflows. Complexity is growing.

At Yazio, we believe growth shouldn’t mean more manual work or disconnected systems; it should mean smarter architecture, better automation, and technology that truly empowers teams.

That’s why we’re looking for a Marketing Operations & Automation Manager who will design, build, and elevate the automation and technology backbone across our Marketing organization.

If you love connecting tools, building scalable systems, experimenting with AI, and turning complexity into clarity, this is your opportunity to create real leverage in a high-impact environment.

The role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal, or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

Own and continuously evolve the automation and MarTech ecosystem across Marketing, ensuring scalable workflows, reliable data foundations, and operational excellence.

You will:

 - Design and implement scalable automation architectures across marketing functions, connecting tools, data sources, and workflows

 - Take ownership of the Marketing tech landscape — evaluating, optimizing, consolidating, and introducing tools where needed

 - Identify and implement AI-powered solutions to increase efficiency, creativity, and measurable performance

 - Build hands-on automations and integrations (e.g., APIs, workflow tools like Zapier, n8n, scripting solutions such as JavaScript or similar)

 - Partner closely with Development and Analytics to ensure robust tracking, clean data flows, and sustainable system design

 - Analyze existing processes and proactively challenge inefficiencies with technical solutions

 - Establish clear documentation, standards, and governance to ensure long-term scalability

 - Act as a sparring partner for operational stakeholders, complementing strong process foundations with deep technical expertise

 - Continuously explore emerging technologies and ensure Yazio stays ahead in a rapidly evolving MarTech and AI landscape
   



YOUR PROFILE

You are a system thinker with a hands-on builder mindset.

You combine technical curiosity with business understanding — and you enjoy turning ideas into working solutions.

You bring:

 - Several years of experience in Marketing Automation, Growth Operations, MarTech, or technical marketing roles

 - Hands-on experience with automation tools, APIs, and workflow builders (e.g., Zapier or similar platforms)

 - Strong understanding of tracking and attribution setups (e.g., AppsFlyer, Braze, or comparable ecosystems)

 - Experience designing and implementing technical workflows

 - Confidence collaborating closely with engineers and technical stakeholders

 - A structured and documentation-driven way of working

 - The ability to evaluate tools critically and make thoughtful build-vs-buy decisions

 - A pragmatic mindset: you know when to automate, when to simplify, and when a process is the better solution

 - A genuine interest in health, nutrition, or well-being, and motivation to contribute to a mission-driven product



WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30 vacation days to relax and recharge, plus 5 child sick days if your little one needs you

 - A focus-driven culture that values efficiency over long hours - no overtime expectations, and if it happens, you get that time back!

 - A high-impact environment where your work drives real change - short decision-making processes and no micromanagement

 - A team culture where ambition and balance go hand in hand, supported by strong connections - from our fully covered company retreat to team meetups and virtual coffee breaks

 - Tools and support to do your best work: MacBook, monitor, and €1,000 annual learning budg

source_jobs.title: Senior Mobile Engineer (KMP)
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE

At Yazio, our product squads are the engines that drive our mission: helping people lead healthier lives. We're looking for a product-minded Senior Mobile Engineer to join one of our core squads and build the features that empower millions of users on their wellness journey.

As a key member of a cross-functional team, you'll partner closely with your Product Manager, Engineering Manager and Designer. You will be a vital voice in shaping our product, leveraging our Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) stack to deliver elegant, high-impact solutions for both iOS and Android users.

This role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

Your mission is to translate user needs and product vision into robust, high-quality code that powers a world-class user experience. You will own the technical execution within the squad, living best practices and helping the entire team.

 - Own Features End-to-End. You will take ideas from a technical design to a polished, deployed feature. You'll be responsible for writing clean, maintainable code, ensuring high test coverage and monitoring the impact of your work in production.

 - Partner with Product and Design. You won't just be handed tickets. You'll be a key contributor to the "why," providing technical insights, weighing trade-offs and helping to shape a roadmap that is both ambitious and achievable.

 - Champion Technical Excellence. You will be a steward of our codebase, helping to manage technical debt, improve performance and drive the adoption of modern practices within our Kotlin Multiplatform architecture.

 - Elevate the Team Around You. You'll act as a mentor for other engineers, leading by example with thoughtful code reviews, improving team processes and sharing your knowledge to help everyone grow.
   
   

YOUR PROFILE

We're looking for a seasoned engineer who is passionate about the craft but even more passionate about the impact their code has on users.

 - Deep Expertise in Modern Mobile Development. You have significant experience building native mobile apps on Android (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose). Experience with iOS development (Swift, SwiftUI) is a plus, along with a willingness to expand ownership across both ecosystems. KMP experience is a big plus.

 - A True Product Engineer. You are obsessed with the user experience and the "why" behind what you're building. You're comfortable with product metrics and are driven to see your work make a measurable impact.

 - Pragmatic and Results-Oriented. You have high standards for code quality but also know when to make pragmatic trade-offs to ship value to users. You see technical debt as a portfolio to be managed, not a moral failing.

 - A Collaborative Force Multiplier. You thrive in a team environment. You give and receive feedback graciously and believe that mentoring others and improving shared tools are essential parts of your role.

 - Excellent Communicator. You can clearly articulate complex technical ideas to both technical and non-technical partners, ensuring everyone is aligned.

 - Experience with Kotlin Multiplatform is a massive plus, but a strong foundation in native development and a passion for learning are most important.
   
   


OUR CORE TECH STACK

We believe in Kotlin Multiplatform and use it heavily in our modularized monorepo. We share as much code as possible outside of the UI layer, while building the fully native UI using Compose on Android and SwiftUI on iOS.

 - We use libraries like:
   
   - kotlinx.coroutines
   
   - kotlinx.serialization
   
   - Ktor
   
   - SQLDelight
   
   - Metro for dependency injection.
   
   

WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30 vacation days to relax and recharge, plus 5 child sic

source_jobs.title: Senior Mobile Engineer (Food Tracking)
source_jobs.description:
HEY THERE

We’re looking for a Senior Mobile Engineer to join the Food Tracking squad at Yazio, the team building the core experience of our product. This includes daily food tracking, AI-driven insights, and features used by millions every day.

You are a key part in shaping the Food Tracking squad, leveraging our Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) stack to deliver high-impact solutions for iOS and Android users. You join a cross-functional team partnering closely with Product Managers, Designers and Analysts.

This role is 100% remote and open to candidates based in Germany, Spain, Portugal, or the U.K.



YOUR MISSION

The Food Tracking squad is entering a new phase. From AI-driven features to deep personalization to help users lead a healthier life. Your mission is to shape the future of our squad with your technical expertise.

 - Own Features End-to-End. You take ideas from a technical design to a polished, deployed feature. You are responsible for writing clean, maintainable code, ensuring high quality, and monitoring the impact of your work in production.

 - Lead Migration to KMP: You assess, document and plan the migration of our complex domain from iOS/Android platform code to KMP-first code—while continuing to ship features to our users.

 - Integrate AI Features: Together with the backend team, you bring scaleable AI-powered features to the app and evaluate best practices to ensure a great user experience.

 - Partner with Product and Design. You won't just be handed tickets. You are a key contributor to the why and what by assessing new technical areas, weighing trade-offs, and helping shape a roadmap that is both ambitious and achievable.

 - Elevate the Team. You act as a mentor for other engineers, leading by example with thoughtful code reviews and improving team processes without being asked.



YOUR PROFILE

We're looking for a seasoned engineer who is passionate about the craft but even more passionate about the impact their code has on users.

 - Expert in Modern Mobile Development. You have significant experience building native mobile apps on Android with Kotlin and Compose, ideally with KMP. Experience on iOS with Swift and SwiftUI is a huge plus as well as the willingness to expand ownership across both ecosystems.

 - End-to-End Ownership. You have a track record in organizing delivery of features end-to-end.

 - AI Adopter. You're comfortable using AI tools to automate your daily workflows and achieve results while maintaining a high bar of quality and safety. Experience in integrating and shaping AI-driven features in production environments is a huge plus.

 - Pragmatic. You know how to build the smallest piece fast to achieve results. You know what to build first and what to leave for later. You have high standards for code quality and leave it better than you found it even when things move quickly.

 - True Product Engineer. You are obsessed with the user experience and the "why" behind what you're building. You're comfortable with product metrics and are driven to see your work make a measurable impact.

 - Excellent Communicator. You can clearly articulate complex technical ideas to both technical and non-technical partners. You’re comfortable documenting technical topics in written form to your peers.



OUR CORE TECH STACK

We believe in Kotlin Multiplatform and use it heavily in our modularized monorepo. We share as much code as possible outside of the UI layer, while building the fully native UI using Compose on Android and SwiftUI on iOS.

We use libraries like:

- kotlinx.coroutines

- kotlinx.serialization

- Ktor

- SQLDelight

- Metro for dependency injection.



WHY US?

 - An exciting product with millions of users in over 150 countries, driven by our mission to transform the world through healthy eating

 - A remote-first setup: work 100% from home, join a co-working space, or work abroad for several weeks per year

 - 30 vacation days to relax and recharge, plus 5 child sick days if your

notes: Yazio has a mix of tech and non-tech roles, with a focus on mobile engineering and internal tooling. The company is likely a startup with a moderate hiring volume.
